metadata._comment: PLACEHOLDER / SCAFFOLD — no geometry bundled. See README 'Licensing & Commercial Use'. TODO: drop a licence-cleared constituency GeoJSON here.
metadata.license: UNCONFIRMED — must be verified before commercial use (OSM/ODbL share-alike, or Malawi Electoral Commission as authoritative-but-unlicensed alternative).

properties.id: string — stable unique id (e.g. OSM relation id or MEC code)
properties.name: string — constituency name
